title: デビュー戦の後に・次は私がっ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon isn't able to take first in her debut
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she wasn't able to stand center stage,
just participating in the winning concert has a
rousing effect on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her goal is to become a top Umadol. If she can
win a maiden race and carry that momentum
forward, her fanbase should increase.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We set our sights on winning at least two races at
the Pre-Open level or higher during junior year to
jump-start her fame.
